title: Public API / CLI post media item
description: Media object for POST /v1/posts and verlynk posts:create --json. Do NOT use mediaUrl/mimeType here (those are MCP-only).

mediaId.description: From POST /v1/media/presign (then complete) or verlynk media:upload

contentType.description: MIME type, e.g. image/png, image/jpeg, video/mp4
